column1: # MITRE ATT&CK Enterprise — curated subset (offline reference)
# Lines starting with '#' and blank lines are ignored.
# `id` is the technique or sub-technique ID (T#### or T####.###).
# `tactic` is the primary tactic name; sub-techniques inherit their parent's tactic.
# `name` is the technique's canonical short name.
# This file is the authoritative allowed-list for `mitre-validate.sh`. A
# `MITRE:` line on a finding must reference IDs present here. To extend with
# additional techniques, append rows in the same tab-separated format and keep
# the file sorted by ID. Source values were taken from the public MITRE
# Coverage: ~120 of the most-cited enterprise techniques across all 14 tactics.
